commands.review_summary:
The PR makes CLI command-group registration async, awaits eager dynamic-import registration through core/browser CLI registration call sites, updates related tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.5.12 fire-and-forget eager registration while browser groups await dynamic imports, so `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_LAZY_SUBCOMMANDS=1 openclaw browser status` can parse before handlers attach. I did not execute the CLI because this was a read-only review.
